title: Lenient Suggestions
description: Makes command suggestions kinder, they can now autocomplete things from namespaces other than minecraft
body:
### Will no longer receive updates because functionality has been merged into fabric api as of version `0.130.0`!! :>

Command suggestions will now autocomplete with modded namespaces! how joyous!! :D

![Showcase of a lenient suggestion with /enchant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e5Jhl8hD/images/056c67e62e246a16c2e3c3adb0b29213f201fa29.gif)
